title: ferray-stride-tricks: as_strided only works on owned Array — not on ArrayView
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

as_strided() and as_strided_unchecked() require &Array<T, D>. NumPy's as_strided works on any array-like, including views. In ferray, if you have an ArrayView (e.g., from a slice or broadcast), you can't apply as_strided to it. Add overloads that accept &ArrayView<T, D> in addition to &Array<T, D>, or make both functions generic over a trait that both types implement.
